B: d{1,18,7,20,7,11,1,1,7,9,15,17,7,20,13,5,20,6,7,7,11,10,14,19,12,2,3,12,9,5,14,18,10,13,2,13,20,10,18,5,8,20,19,7,17,19,13,19,9,9,2,14,3,9,11,12,15,4,4,14,13,19,7,5,15,8,1,20,15,14,15,3,3,19,9,13,1,15,2,12,19,7,7,5,10,1,1,4,7,16,13,20,11,14,3,1,20,3,7,1,17,16,14,6,16,14,17}
